newsSince: No new material catalyst since June 9 beyond what was already in the prior case. AAOI's raised FY outlook (~$1.1B), $324M advanced-node backlog, and 800G/1.6T capacity ramp in Taiwan/Texas were already disclosed and reflected pre-June 9. The -6% move since June 9 is a continuation of profit-taking/rerating unwind from the May 13 high; >50% YoY diluted-share growth from aggressive ATM raises remains the structural overhang.

sources.label: StocksToTrade: AAOI surges on AI datacenter ramp
Simply Wall St: AAOI valuation after 800G/1.6T orders
AAOI story shifting with big transceiver orders (Yahoo Finance)

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold near the bottom on the CPO lens. No new evidence since June 9; AAOI is a discovered, +286% YTD merchant transceiver name not directly levered to the co-packaged-optics/package bottleneck. A -6% pullback trims chase risk but does not make it hidden or CPO-direct.
verdicts.bull: Verified 800G/1.6T hyperscale order book and 1.6T ramp keep it tied to scale-out optics demand.
verdicts.neutral: Strong demand but transceiver merchant, not CPO-native; already widely discovered.
verdicts.bear: Heavy ATM dilution, customer concentration, and +286% YTD crowding; low CPO alpha.

verdicts.rankRationale: Scale-out optics thesis strengthened: confirmed $200M+ 1.6T order plus $124M 800G book and Rosenblatt PT to $140. But fresh up-to-$600M ATM offsets per-share asymmetry vs the prior 'up' case. Net mild positive on the master bottleneck list.
verdicts.bull: Verified 1.6T/800G order book and hyperscale relationships make AAOI a real scale-out bandwidth bottleneck play.
verdicts.neutral: Order momentum genuine but repeatedly funded by equity issuance, capping per-share upside.
verdicts.bear: Up-to-$600M ATM stacked on prior programs dilutes the +286% YTD rerating; execution/pricing risk high.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: 1.6T order ramp and additional hyperscale wins
verdicts.primaryRisk: Aggressive ATM dilution and transceiver pricing
